case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ANGEL ARELLANO HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. HEARING CONTINUED TO OCT-16-19 AT 8:30 A.M. D.506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-16-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGEL ARELLAN HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGEL ARELLANO HERNANDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANGEL ARELLANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANGEL ARELLANO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED AUG-28-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANGEL ARELLANO
